query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO rss_feeds (name, url, category, active, fetchErrorCount, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('Morning Ag Clips', 'https://www.morningagclips.com/feed/', 'internacional', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('The Agribiz', 'https://www.theagribiz.com/feed/', 'mercado', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Campo & Negócios', 'https://campoenegocios.com/feed', 'mercado', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Agência Brasil - Economia', 'https://agenciabrasil.ebc.com.br/rss/economia/feed.xml', 'mercado', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Farm Progress', 'https://www.farmprogress.com/rss.xml', 'internacional', 1, 0, NOW(), NOW());
